title: Tether Gold Surpasses $3.3 Billion as Reserves Surge 36% in Q1, Driven by Flight to Hard Assets
content: Tether Gold (XAU₮), the world’s leading tokenized gold product, continued its rapid growth in the first quarter of 2026 as record gold prices and persistent macroeconomic uncertainty strengthened investor demand for safe-haven assets.  The quarter marked a new high for global gold demand by value, as investors continued to seek exposure […]
